case_title: ZAHID SHAIKH VS. REDURUS PEREZ et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHAIKH, ZAHID AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, REDURUS DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHAIKH, ZAHID SERVED APR-10-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, REDURUS
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, REDURUS

ORDER GRANTING EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER SHORTENING TIME ON A MOTION TO VACATE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. (MOTION ON 4-30-2013, MOVING PAPERS SHALL BE FILED AND SERVED BY 4-25-2013 PERSONAL SERVICE, OPPOSITION PAPERS SHALL BE FILED AND SERVED BY 4-29-2013 PERSONAL SERVICE.)
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $45 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHAIKH, ZAHID

ORDER GRANTING EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER SHORTENING TIME ON A MOTION TO VACATE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. (HEARING ON MAY 7, 2013 9:30AM. MOVING PAPERS SHALL BE FILED AND SERVED BY MAY 2, 2013 PERSONAL SERVICE. OPPOSITION PAPERS SHALL BE FILED AND SERVED BY MAY 6, 2013 PERSONAL SERVICE)

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHAIKH, ZAHID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEREZ, REDURUS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 166 TURK STREET, UNIT 15, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102., SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
